summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of DIRGED landing page. All core functionality working correctly including navigation, smooth scrolling, mobile menu, and all sections displaying properly.
passed_tests: Navbar displays all 9 navigation links correctly (Home, Competências, Capital Humano, Mapa, Gestão Documental, Gestão da Informação, Iniciativas, Prêmios, Projetos Futuros)
Smooth scroll navigation works when clicking nav items
Hero section displays correctly with title, subtitle and CTA buttons
Hero Explorar button scrolls to Competências section
Hero Localização button scrolls to Mapa section
Competências section shows 6 competency cards as expected
Capital Humano section displays correctly with stats and content
Mapa section shows Belo Horizonte (4 locations) and Contagem (3 locations) with markers and legend
Gestão Documental section displays 4 feature cards as expected
Gestão da Informação section displays with stats and content
Últimas Iniciativas section with marquee animation and 3 initiative cards
Prêmios section with 4 award cards as expected
Projetos Futuros section with timeline layout and 3 project cards
Mobile menu toggle works correctly - opens/closes properly
All data-testid attributes are present and functional
No JavaScript errors detected on the page
Modern styling with black background and purple/pink/yellow color palette implemented correctly
Responsive design works on both desktop and mobile viewports
